heading: Cooperation by Secretary of Agriculture with Territories
label: 565a Cooperation by Secretary of Agriculture with Territories
text: The Secretary of Agriculture is authorized to cooperate with the Territories of the United States on the same terms and conditions as with States under sections 564 and 565 of this title.1See References in Text note below.1
notes: References in TextSections 564 and 565 of this title, referred to in text, were repealed by , , .Pub. L. 95–313, § 13(a)(1)92 Stat. 374July 1, 1978
